# PPT Master Vendor

This directory vendors the minimal `template-fill-pptx` worker from
`hugohe3/ppt-master` for Moonwalk's PPTX template-fill prototype.

Source project: https://github.com/hugohe3/ppt-master
License: MIT

Only the direct PPTX template-fill path is included. The full SVG generation
pipeline, examples, assets, image generation tooling, and live preview tooling
are intentionally not vendored.
